name: Lantern
description: Paper lanterns drifting in the night, each casting its own halo — reseeding floats them to new heights and re-mixes the glow.

code.style: --ty: @rand(8%, 38%); --op: @rand(0.55, 1); --rule: ( /* lantern body and halo share one emitted color */ --glow: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 31%; top: var(--ty); width: 38%; height: 50%; border-radius: 30% / 24%; background: @var(--glow); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(300px / @Y) @var(--glow); opacity: var(--op); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
